caption: bro i just had jhol momo at this hole-in-the-wall place near asan and i'm not joking when i say the achar had me sweating like i ran a marathon. peak kathmandu energy. would do it again. 10/10. 🔥
assignment due in 6 hours and i'm here making maggi at 2am thinking about ama's tarkari. sydney doesn't hit the same yaar 😭
Golden hour at Phewa Lake. Some days the light just does all the talking.
imageQuery: phewa lake pokhara golden hour reflection

caption: settle this once and for all

poll.question: what's the superior late night move?

content: he told me he'd do the dishes 'in 5 minutes' three hours ago and is now asleep on the couch. i'm standing here with a wet sponge debating if this is grounds for divorce in month 2 of marriage.

caption: NEPAL JUST WON AND I'M SCREAMING AT 3AM MY NEIGHBOURS HATE ME BUT WE DON'T CARE LET'S GOOOOO 🇳🇵🏏
12 hour shift done. toronto winter hitting different when you leave the hospital and it's already dark. made dal bhat when i got home because nothing else was gonna cut it. calling ama in 10.
imageQuery: toronto winter hospital night nurse walking

caption: just discovered this lok dohori artist from dhading and bro... the vocals??? why is no one talking about this. adding to the gundruk playlist immediately.
found this vintage dhaka fabric at asan market today for 200 rupees and i'm about to turn it into the sickest jacket you've ever seen. sustainable fashion is literally just paying attention yaar ✨
imageQuery: kathmandu asan market colorful fabric stall

caption: spent £12 on lunch today in london and thought about how that's like 2000 rupees and could've gotten me a full khana set with extras back home. the pain is real.
leg day complete bro. dubai heat + squats = different type of suffering. but we don't skip. never skip. dal bhat power 💪🏽

made chiya at 11pm and realized i've been using tea as a coping mechanism for literally everything. bad day? chiya. good day? chiya. existential crisis? chiya. the cup is both the problem and the solution.
imageQuery: nepal tea cup night evening light

caption: found a new cafe in fitzroy with the most perfect flat white and now my whole sunday is saved ☕️ melbourne you're doing something right
imageQuery: melbourne cafe flat white latte art

content: she said my cooking was 'fine' but then finished the entire pot and asked if there were leftovers. i'm taking that as a win.

caption: spent 3 hours making dal bhat from scratch for sunday lunch. sunita's mom on video call said 'thik cha' which i'm pretty sure is the highest compliment i'll ever receive.
unpopular opinion: the best momo spots don't have fancy interiors. if the tiles are cracked and there's exactly one uncle running the whole operation, that's where the magic is. thamel vs reality.
group project meeting and i'm the only one who showed up on time. this is why i have trust issues. sydney uni really testing my patience yaar 🙃
champions league final watch party — what's the move?

poll.question: how are we watching the big match?

caption: Annapurna South from Poon Hill at sunrise. Waited two hours in the cold. Worth every second.
imageQuery: annapurna mountain sunrise poon hill nepal

content: he tried to make momo from scratch last night because i said i missed kathmandu food and they were... not good. but i ate them anyway and said they were amazing because watching him try was the cutest thing i've ever seen.

caption: remember when load shedding was a thing and we all just sat in the dark pretending we had plans. simpler times.
wifey life update: found out he keeps his shoes in the bedroom and i keep mine by the door and we've been passive-aggressively moving each other's shoes for a week. marriage is wild yaar 😂
sunday biryani ritual complete. called ama while cooking and she walked me through it like i'm still 12. toronto winter feels less cold when the kitchen smells like home.
imageQuery: biryani cooking pot rice nepali spices

caption: nepali music hot take time

poll.question: what's the best era of nepali music?

caption: thrift haul: vintage kurta (150rs), handwoven scarf (200rs), confidence (priceless). asan market never misses 🛍️
debugging code at 1am in london while it's morning back home and ama is asking via whatsapp if i ate breakfast. the duality of nepali diaspora life.

content: we had our first proper fight last week over wet bathroom towels. i thought marriage would be about big romantic gestures but it's actually about agreeing where the towel goes. still figuring it out.

caption: rest day but still did a light walk because sitting still feels wrong bro. dubai marina at sunset. gym life but make it scenic 🌅

there's something about being nepali and never quite fitting into the boxes people make for you. too traditional for some, too modern for others. so you just make chiya and exist loudly in the in-between.
made kebabs. she pretended not to be impressed. ate four. i'm keeping score.
someone please explain why patan's momo places hit different. is it the water? the vibes? divine intervention? went there today and my life has changed bro.
imageQuery: patan nepal street food vendor momo

caption: walked past a nepali restaurant in sydney today and almost cried. didn't go in because i'm broke but i stood outside for like 10 minutes just smelling the air. this is what homesickness looks like yaar 😭
Caught a street vendor in Pokhara's old town. The afternoon light was doing all the work. Sometimes you don't need mountains.
imageQuery: pokhara nepal street vendor afternoon light

caption: why do nepali uncles think they can fix literally anything with tape and willpower. my dad once fixed a chair with string and it lasted 5 years. respect.

content: we've been married for 2 months and i just found out he's been secretly buying me my favorite chocolate every week and hiding it in the drawer for when i have bad days. i'm not crying you're crying.

caption: nepal's bowling attack today was INSANE. woke up the whole building celebrating that last wicket. we're winning everything this year i'm calling it now 🇳🇵
night shift brain: ordered coffee in nepali at tim hortons and the cashier just stared at me. toronto i love you but sometimes my brain is still in kathmandu.
just made a 4-hour nepali road trip playlist and it's a journey from lok dohori to rap to 2000s nostalgia. if you know you know. link in bio maybe if i remember.
wore a full traditional dhaka outfit today and got 'where did you buy that?' like bestie i MADE it. thrift + skills = actual fashion. respect the craft ✨
remote work means i can wear a shirt for zoom calls and pajamas below. living the dream except when i forget and stand up mid-meeting.
cardio day. ran 10k in dubai heat. if dal bhat can fuel entire mountains it can fuel this bro. never doubt the power. 🏃🏽‍♂️💪🏽

content: he stays up late on video calls with my family in nepal even though he has work early the next day because he knows it makes me happy. didn't know i needed someone like this.

caption: the thing about living in a small nepali town is everyone knows everyone's business but somehow no one knows anything useful. it's both comforting and absolutely chaotic.
she asked me to pick up groceries. i came back with everything except what she asked for. marriage is just improvisation at this point.
the eternal nepali debate

poll.question: dal bhat vs momo — final answer

caption: sunday morning in melbourne: made chiya the way ama taught me, sunita said it tasted like home. that's the bar now. no pressure.
tried a new chowmein place in thamel and honestly bro it was mid. the jhol momo saved the experience though. you win some you lose some. 7/10 overall.
exam tomorrow and i'm watching nepali tiktoks at 3am. sydney uni really bringing out the worst study habits in me yaar 📚😭

content: she leaves little notes in my lunch box when i go to work. today it said 'don't forget we're out of milk' which is the most romantic thing anyone's ever written me.

caption: watching nepal cricket is good for the heart they said. it'll be fun they said. i've aged 10 years in the last 3 overs. this team will be the death of me (affectionate).
